---
title: "test_muninn.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_muninn.py"
loc: 62
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.02
style_score: 3.67
intel_score: 7.85
overall_score: 4.52
---

## Intent
The `test_muninn.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_hud, muninn_instance, test_muninn_api_key_priority, test_muninn_anti_oscillation, test_muninn_crucible_rollback, test_muninn_learning_cycle, test_raven_proxy_injection. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_hud, muninn_instance, test_muninn_api_key_priority, test_muninn_anti_oscillation, test_muninn_crucible_rollback, test_muninn_learning_cycle, test_raven_proxy_injection. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [tests.harness.manual_learn](file://tests.harness.manual_learn)
- [tests.harness.raven_proxy](file://tests.harness.raven_proxy)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)

### Exports
- `mock_hud`
- `muninn_instance`
- `test_muninn_api_key_priority`
- `test_muninn_anti_oscillation`
- `test_muninn_crucible_rollback`
- `test_muninn_learning_cycle`
- `test_raven_proxy_injection`
